description:
Going to therapy is a sign of strength, not weakness. My sponsor BetterHelp makes therapy simple, with 10% off your first month to help you get started: https://betterhelp.com/MrBallen


Time Stamps:
#3 -- "Bleeding Out" -- 00:44 -- You couldn't have planned this even if you wanted to
#2 -- "Going Down" -- 9:52 -- A man and woman say goodbye after a date, what happens next is not what you think
#1 -- "The Symbol" -- 23:24 -- A group in Spain begin receiving letters from another being


🎧 Follow and listen to ALL of our podcasts from Ballen Studios - find them on Amazon Music, or wherever you get your podcasts!
🔊 A Twist of History 👉 https://ballen.lnk.to/atwistofhistory - New episodes every Wednesday

🔊 MrBallen Podcast: Strange, Dark and Mysterious Stories 👉 https://Wondery.fm/Ballen_YTD - New episodes every Monday

🔊 MrBallen’s Medical Mysteries 👉 https://Wondery.fm/MM_YTD - New episodes every Tuesday

🔊 Redacted: Declassified Mysteries with Luke Lamana 👉 https://Wondery.fm/RED_YTD - New episodes every Tuesday

🔊 Wartime Stories Podcast 👉 https://ballen.lnk.to/Fz9J66 - New episodes every Monday

🔊 Bedtime Stories 👉 http://apple.co/ballenbedtimestories - New episodes every Wednesday

🔊 RUN, FOOL! 👉 https://smarturl.it/RunFool - New episodes every other Tuesday

🔊 Late Nights with Nexpo 👉 https://ballen.lnk.to/latenightswithnexpo



Follow me on Instagram, Twitter and the rest of social media 👉 "@MrBallen"

NEW MrBallen merchandise 👉 https://shopmrballen.com

Our 2nd YouTube channel 👉                                                                                  @mrballenshorts                                                                                                                                                          

Our Podcast channel 👉                                                                                           @OfficialMrBallenPodcast                                                                                                                                                            


Please post story suggestions on our subreddit 👉 r/mrballen (https://www.reddit.com/r/mrballen/)

Check out these other channels and videos!
​@rottenmangopod:
China's "Red Uncle/Sister Hong" Exposed W/ 1600+ Victims But Became The Biggest MEME - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j631kMaKCpg
@kallmekris:
This IMPOSSIBLE Cold Case Was Solved By A Teenager | Marise Chiverella - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FX6t7--6dAw&pp=0gcJCa0JAYcqIYzv
@TheWhyFiles:
Asteroid Apophis is Coming | Ground Zero: California - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c-yXhTmSSro
@ExploreWithUs:
Cops Discover Bodies in Woman's Trunk During Traffic Stop - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7xboEsXt_a0
Cop Unknowingly Approaches Serial Killer in the Wilderness - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V4pEJXHvSjo


The next time you're at the beach with the Like Button, wait until they take off their sunhat to go run in the water, and while they're gone fill their hat up with mayonnaise. Also please subscribe/turn on all notifications so you don't miss any of our weekly stories! 


For educational, documentary and entertainment purposes only. Based on actual events.

A quick note about our stories: They’re all based on true events, but we sometimes use pseudonyms to protect the people involved, and some details are fictionalized for dramatic purposes.
